channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Exploring Chinese Architectural Modernism and Toronto’s Early Digital Design Era
item.description: Montreal’s Canadian Centre for Architecture (CCA) is currently presenting 'How Modern: Biographies of Architecture in China 1949–1979,' an exhibition revealing the rich, complex evolution of Chinese a...

item.title: Bolt Consults Authorities and Drivers Following 33% Fuel Price Increase in Tanzania
item.description: Bolt Tanzania is actively engaging with authorities and other stakeholders after fuel prices went up sharply by 33 percent. This surge has put immediate pressure on drivers, many of whom rely on daily...

item.title: Heavy Rain in Karachi Causes Electrocution Deaths and Traffic Disruptions
item.description: Karachi faced heavy rains and strong winds on April 2, 2026, resulting in at least six fatalities and multiple injuries. The worst incidents were due to electrocution from exposed wiring and structura...

item.title: Supreme Court overturns FEMA confiscation of Accord Distilleries & Breweries
item.description: The Supreme Court of India has annulled the confiscation of properties belonging to Accord Distilleries & Breweries Pvt Ltd and its directors, including DMK MP S Jagathrakshakan and his son, as well a...

item.title: Ukhozi FM announces new 2026 presenter lineup amid radio industry changes
item.description: Ukhozi FM, the largest radio station in South Africa, has revealed its 2026/27 presenter lineup with significant changes aimed at attracting 10 million listeners. Key adjustments include Velani “Vee” ...

item.title: Trump urges Iran to negotiate amid destruction of major bridge and rising tensions
item.description: Tensions between the United States and Iran have escalated after a strike partially destroyed Iran’s largest bridge, killing eight and injuring 95. President Donald Trump warned Tehran to negotiate a ...

item.title: Quebec enacts law limiting religious symbols and public prayers in state institutions
item.description: Quebec's government, led by the Coalition Avenir Québec (CAQ) and supported by the Parti Québécois, has passed Bill 9, which extends the province’s secularism framework. The law prohibits daycare work...

item.title: Tensions escalate as US strikes Iranian bridge and threats intensify
item.description: The situation in the Middle East has sharply escalated following a US strike on the B1 bridge in Karaj, Iran, which Donald Trump claimed destroyed the country's tallest bridge. Trump threatened furthe...

item.title: Review of ‘Hey Kay Navin?’: Examining Marriage, Ambition and Personal Choices
item.description: The Marathi series 'Hay Kay Navin?' on ZEE5, directed by Varun Narvekar, explores the intricacies of a ten-year marriage through the eyes of Rama, played by Priya Bapat, and her husband Aditya, portra...

item.title: Nicola Wealth suspends withdrawals and plans orderly wind-down of real estate fund
item.description: Nicola Wealth Management Ltd., a Vancouver-based firm managing $17.6 billion, has stopped allowing investors to redeem funds from its Nicola Value Add Real Estate LP, valued at $755 million, due to lo...

item.title: Potential Impacts of Regional Chair System Changes in Waterloo Region
item.description: Recent discussions about potential reforms to the regional chair system in Waterloo Region have raised questions about governance, decision-making, and local representation. The regional chair plays a...

item.title: Pam Bondi steps down as U.S. Attorney General amid Justice Department controversies
item.description: Pam Bondi has officially stepped down as Attorney General of the United States, concluding a controversial tenure marked by high-profile investigations and political scrutiny. Bondi, a close ally of f...

item.title: Trump criticises French President Macron in personal remark amid global oil tensions
item.description: US President Donald Trump recently made a personal remark about French President Emmanuel Macron, referencing an incident involving Macron’s wife, Brigitte, from 2025. The jibe came at a time when glo...

item.title: Government discontinues several minority scholarship schemes post 2021-22, details shared in Rajya Sabha
item.description: On 30th March 2026, the Union Minister for Minority Affairs, Kiren Rijiju, informed the Rajya Sabha that several scholarship schemes for minority students were discontinued after the 2021-22 academic ...

item.title: Garry Lyon apologises for hot mic remarks and other recent political mishaps
item.description: Fox Footy host Garry Lyon has issued an apology to Social Services Minister Tanya Plibersek after AFL 360 accidentally aired behind-the-scenes footage in which Lyon referred to Plibersek as the minist...

item.title: CBSE implements three-language curriculum and reforms Class 10 exams under NEP 2020
item.description: The Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) has introduced substantial reforms in the secondary school curriculum and Class 10 board examination structure, following the National Education Policy ...

item.title: Heavy Rain Causes Multiple Fatalities in Karachi, City on Emergency Alert
item.description: Karachi faced heavy rains on Thursday, leading to the deaths of at least five people and prompting the city administration to declare an emergency. According to police and rescue officials, four peopl...

item.title: NSIA Profit Drops 91% to N161bn Due to Currency and Tariff Effects, Core Performance Still Strong
item.description: The Nigeria Sovereign Investment Authority (NSIA) report say their profit for 2025 don sharply fall by 91 percent to N161.1 billion from N1.89 trillion wey dem make in 2024. The main wahala na US tari...

item.title: 70-Year-Old Fisherman Missing After Being Swept into Sea at Herolds Bay
item.description: A 70-year-old local fisherman went missing on Wednesday evening after being swept off the rocks at Voelklip in Herolds Bay, near George. The incident occurred around the turn of the spring low tide. E...

item.title: President Ruto Reaffirms Confidence in 2027 and Focus on Delivering for Kenyans
item.description: President William Ruto has addressed his critics with a strong message of confidence, declaring that no political opponent can threaten his position ahead of the 2027 elections. Speaking at the AIPCA ...
